evaluationFactors: Experience (Projects of similar size and scope) - 20 points (20% of Total)
Approach and Methodology - 30 points (30% of Total)
Value Added Services - 5 points (5% of Total)
overview: The City of Banning, California (Banning Police Department) is soliciting proposals under RFP-25-124 for an eCitation System Software solution to replace their current paper citation process with a modern mobile e-ticketing, ticket management, collision reporting, and data analytics platform for 40 users. The business problem being addressed is the need to reduce patrol officer stop times, increase officer safety, improve efficiency in recording and delivering citations and crash reports, streamline data delivery to courts and state systems (CHP SWITRS), and enable centralized access to citation and collision data from a single source. Success looks like a fully deployed eCitation system compatible with the department's existing iPhones (iOS devices), Sun Ridge Systems RIMS CAD, and Crossroads Software Report Writer, with court export capabilities, RMS interfaces, CHP-180 tow form mobile application, mobile printers, comprehensive training, project management, and ongoing annual maintenance and support for up to five years. Key constraints include grant funding requirements (Highway Safety Grant Programs, Title VI Civil Rights Act compliance, active SAM.gov registration), cyber insurance in addition to standard insurance requirements, compatibility with Windows 10 Pro for any desktop client, a minimum of five years of relevant vendor experience, submission exclusively through the OpenGov electronic bidding portal by February 18, 2026, and a contract structure of one initial year with four optional one-year renewals. The evaluation will be based on a weighted points system across six criteria with Approach and Methodology carrying the highest weight at 30 points, and top-scoring proposers may be invited for demonstrations.

requirements.requirement: Provide eCitation system with mobile and desktop apps and sync service for 40 users
System must be compatible with City of Banning Police Department mobile work iPhones (iOS devices)
Provide Court Export Module for delivering citation data to Justice, Circuit, and Municipal courts
Provide interface to output citation records to RMS (Sun Ridge Systems RIMS)
Provide interface to upload collision report data and documents to the CHP SWITRS system
Provide interface to output collision records to RMS (RIMS)
Provide CHP-180 Tow Form Application (Mobile)
Compatible with Sun Ridge Systems RIMS CAD System
Compatible with Crossroads Software Report Writer for collision reporting (countywide grant project)
Vendor desktop application client, if applicable, must be compatible with Windows 10 Pro
Provide 6 mobile printers if offered, or ability to purchase separately, including PM service and supplies cost
Provide cost for additional subscriptions as the department expands in personnel
Provide reporting capability for mandatory state reporting
Enable access to citation and crash data/information from one source
Provide project management and training for all systems
Provide installation and training for all systems
Provide annual maintenance and support for all systems with recurring annual cost for the next five years
Provide cost of upgrades for all systems when available
Vendor must have at least five (5) years of experience within the past five (5) years providing services of similar type and scope
Vendor must not have filed for bankruptcy under any business name over the past five (5) years
Must have an active SAM.gov account in good standing and provide Unique Entity ID number
Must register on OpenGov and download the solicitation to appear on Prospective Bidders List
Must acknowledge all addenda electronically via the City's Bidding Website
Must comply with all grant requirements per RFP and attachments including Highway Safety Grant Programs and Title VI Civil Rights Act
Must be able to meet all grant requirements and provide support to City staff with grant management
Must not be on the CA Debarment List
Cyber Insurance coverage required in addition to standard agreement insurance requirements
Provide at least 3 references within the past 5 years of clients for comparable services
Proposals may not be withdrawn for a period of 120 days following the submission deadline
Company must possess valid City of Banning Business License throughout the term of the contract
Execute Agreement and furnish required insurance and business tax certificate within 14 calendar days of award
If applicable, Company and/or key personnel shall hold appropriate license for the discipline and services
Certify no ex parte communications with City Councilmembers concerning this RFP after public advertisement date
Disclose any past or current business and personal relationships with current Banning elected officials, appointed officials, or City employees
Identify all key personnel by name, title, phone number, experience, licenses/certifications, and assigned work portions
Include affirmative statement that proposer and all assigned key professional staff are properly licensed to practice in California
Only one proposal may be submitted per Company; multiple simultaneous proposals will result in rejection of all
Proposals must be submitted exclusively through the City's Electronic Bidding System (OpenGov); no facsimile, email, or mail submissions accepted

format: Proposals must be submitted electronically via the City's Electronic Bidding System (OpenGov) at https://secure.procurenow.com/portal/banning-ca
No facsimile, email, mail, or other format submissions accepted
Proposals must be typed and arranged/divided in the sequence specified in Section V (Vendor Questionnaire)
All proposal documents and supplementary documents must be uploaded using the City's bidding website prior to deadline
Companies must be registered on OpenGov and listed as Prospective Bidder
All addenda must be acknowledged electronically via the City's Bidding Website
attachmentsAndForms: Attachment A - SAMPLE - AGREEMENT FOR PROFESSIONAL SERVICES
Attachment C - Certification Regarding Debarment, Suspension, Ineligibility Form
Attachment D - DRAFT Grant Agreement - TR26018 Banning

requiredDocuments.name: Cover Letter
requiredDocuments.description: Brief general statement of intent to perform services, summary of qualifications, willingness to enter into contract, and identification of single contact person for RFP review process

requiredDocuments.name: Statement of Understanding and Approach
requiredDocuments.description: Demonstrate understanding of services, describe general approach, organization and staffing, implementation plan with project management methods, detailed project schedule with tasks, deliverables, durations, and transition plan

requiredDocuments.name: Company Information and Company Personnel
requiredDocuments.description: Contact information, organizational entity type, litigation history, key personnel names, experience, licenses/certifications, subcontractor identification, and California licensing affirmation

requiredDocuments.name: Experience and References
requiredDocuments.description: Demonstration of minimum 5 years experience, at least 3 references within past 5 years with client names, addresses, telephone numbers, email addresses, explanation of services, and project dates

requiredDocuments.name: Price Proposal
requiredDocuments.description: All-inclusive maximum price with full breakdown of all direct and indirect costs including hourly rates, reimbursable expenses, mileage/travel, miscellaneous fees, and IRS rate compliance statement for travel costs

requiredDocuments.name: Value Added Services
requiredDocuments.description: Description of any value-added services the company offers that may be of use to the City

requiredDocuments.name: Evidence of Insurance
requiredDocuments.description: Evidence of possession of insurance in coverage and amounts listed in the Sample Agreement, including Cyber Insurance coverage

requiredDocuments.name: New Vendor Packet
requiredDocuments.description: Completed New Vendor Packet form downloaded from the solicitation

requiredDocuments.name: Certification-Compliance Form
requiredDocuments.description: Completed Certification-Compliance document downloaded from the solicitation

requiredDocuments.name: Certification Regarding Debarment, Suspension, Ineligibility Form
requiredDocuments.description: Attachment C - completed debarment, suspension, and ineligibility certification form

requiredDocuments.name: Ex Parte Communications Certification
requiredDocuments.description: Certification that bidder and representatives have not communicated with City Councilmembers concerning this RFP

requiredDocuments.name: Debarred, Suspended, Disqualified Questionnaire
requiredDocuments.description: Disclosure of any debarment, suspension, or disqualification history

requiredDocuments.name: Disclosure of Government Positions
requiredDocuments.description: Disclosure of any owner or employee currently or recently holding elected or appointed government positions

requiredDocuments.name: Type of Business Declaration
requiredDocuments.description: Identification of business entity type (C Corp, S Corp, LLC, Partnership, Sole Proprietor, etc.)

requiredDocuments.name: Legal Company Name
requiredDocuments.description: Statement of company's legal name to be verified against California Secretary of State's website

requiredDocuments.name: SAM.gov Unique Entity ID
requiredDocuments.description: Active SAM.gov registration with Unique Entity ID number provided upon proposal submission

requiredDocuments.name: Grant Requirements Acknowledgment
requiredDocuments.description: Confirmation of understanding and agreement to follow all grant requirements per RFP and attachments

requiredDocuments.name: CA Debarment List Confirmation
requiredDocuments.description: Confirmation that company is not on the CA Debarment List

requiredDocuments.name: Disclosure of Relationships
requiredDocuments.description: Disclosure of any past or current business and personal relationships with current Banning officials or employees

requiredVolumes: Proposal - Statement of Understanding and Approach, Company Information, Company Personnel, Disclosure, Experience and References (Section V.B)

deliverables: eCitation System (mobile and desktop apps and sync service)
Interface to output citation records to RMS (RIMS)
Interface to upload collision report data and documents to CHP SWITRS system
Interface to output collision records to RMS (RIMS)
Project management and training for all systems
Annual maintenance and support for all systems
Cost of upgrades for all systems when available
Cost for additional subscriptions as department expands
